name: Birthday surprise! 🎉 [FUTA]
description:
Your friend hired some Futas as a birthday gift,

Want to play a nice raffle with them?

Basically this bots revolves around a raffle game where you grab a ticket that is filled with lewd tasks and mini games or just straight up sex, your friend hired them as a birthday present. enjoy!

Original art: https://x.com/lewdjoy/status/1895136091239284741?s=61

AND MODS IF YOU WANT TO CENSOR THIS AGAIN BE MORE TRANSPARENT ABOUT WHAT IS OKAY AND WHAT NOT, thank you.
creator: FingerFryer
